success_factors: Workflow reached terminal success state and executed all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Robust fallback behavior: after git clone timeout, pipeline continued via zip fallback and still analyzed ~127 files.
Import-mode adapter strategy was feasible (reported confidence ~0.9, feasibility 0.91) and produced runnable MCP scaffolding.
Generated plugin passed MCP health/startup checks (stdio transport, service_health=healthy).
failure_reasons: Primary repository acquisition path failed: git clone timed out at 600s (DownloadNode CloneFailed).
Metadata extraction inconsistencies: dependency scanner falsely reported missing pyproject/environment/requirements despite files being present.
Validation depth was weak: original project tests did not pass/run meaningfully (execution_time=0, empty details), reducing confidence in behavioral correctness.
Endpoint generation quality issues: duplicate endpoints and naming inconsistencies indicate incomplete normalization/dedup logic.

node_performance.download_time: Dominant delay source; clone hit full 600s timeout before fallback. Primary bottleneck in wall-clock runtime.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed successfully after fallback; produced useful module/dependency/risk insights but with partial metadata accuracy.
node_performance.generation_time: Fast enough to produce full MCP scaffold, but quality signals (0 LOC/size metrics, 0 tool_endpoints metrics mismatch) suggest instrumentation gaps.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin smoke health passed, but project/integration test coverage was effectively absent; test stage insufficient for production confidence.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: No reliable telemetry (reported 0 MB), so efficiency cannot be validated; likely under-instrumented.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: No reliable telemetry (reported 0%), preventing CPU efficiency assessment.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Generated artifacts exist and repository content processed via fallback, but reported generated size=0 suggests disk accounting/metrics bug.
